intent_precise:
2. Illumina COVIDSeq - Synthesize First Strand cDNA: Using cDNA plate (pcr_plate, slot 2), reagent_plate (plate, slot reagent plate). With temperature module, magnetic module. (1) Set temperature to 4°C. (2) Disengage magnets to release beads. (3) Pause: 



Replace 200ul filtertipracks before resuming.



 (4) Transfer from source to destination.
intent_concise: Perform magnetic bead separation, temperature control (4°C).
intent: For the Illumina COVIDSeq first strand cDNA synthesis, you'll need to set up your cDNA plate in slot 2 and your reagent plate in the designated reagent slot, making sure both the temperature and magnetic modules are ready. Start by setting the temperature module to 4°C, then disengage the magnets to release the beads from the previous step. At this point, pause the protocol and replace your 200μl filter tip racks with fresh ones before continuing with the transfer step from source to destination wells.

output_schema.protocol_name: 2. Illumina COVIDSeq - Synthesize First Strand cDNA
output_schema.author: Opentrons <protocols@opentrons.com>

commands.message:
Protocol complete.
Seal and shake at 1600 rpm for 1 minute. Centrifuge at 1000 × g for 1 minute. Place on the preprogrammed thermal cycler and run the COVIDSeq FSS program.
